applicant: Pay agreed rent and charges on time
Use and maintain the premises as agreed
recipient: Perform responsibilities assigned to the landlord

applicant: Pay stated rent by the due date
recipient: Accept payment through the agreed method

applicant: Report damage and perform only agreed tenant maintenance
recipient: Handle landlord repairs and non-waivable duties

applicant: Pay only the deposit finally agreed and documented
recipient: Account for deductions and return the refundable balance as applicable

applicant: Repay principal and agreed charges on schedule
recipient: Disclose interest, fees and default consequences

applicant: Make repayments by stated due dates
recipient: Credit payments accurately and provide statements

recipient: Clearly state the rate and calculation method

applicant: Perform the stated role and follow lawful policies
Complete work requirements tied to compensation
recipient: Pay stated compensation and provide required records

applicant: Give valid resignation notice if applicable
recipient: Follow applicable termination and final-payment requirements
Avoid restrictions broader than applicable law permits

applicant: Pay agreed fees and provide required inputs
recipient: Deliver stated services to the agreed standard
Issue accurate invoices for agreed services

applicant: Use services within the agreed scope
recipient: Remain responsible for duties that cannot be excluded
